name: cloudstructs
documentation:
# cloudstructs

High-level constructs for AWS CDK

## Installation

`npm install cloudstructs` or `yarn add cloudstructs`

Version >= 0.2.0 requires AWS CDK v2.

## Constructs

* [`CodeCommitMirror`](src/codecommit-mirror) Mirror a repository to AWS CodeCommit on schedule
* [`EcsServiceRoller`](src/ecs-service-roller) Roll your ECS service tasks on schedule or with
  a rule
* [`EmailReceiver`](src/email-receiver) Receive emails through SES, save them to S3
  and invoke a Lambda function
* [`MjmlTemplate`](src/mjml-template) SES email template from [MJML](https://mjml.io/)
* [`SlackApp`](src/slack-app) Deploy Slack apps from manifests
* [`SlackEvents`](src/slack-events) Send Slack events to Amazon EventBridge
* [`SlackTextract`](src/slack-textract) Extract text from images posted to Slack
  using Amazon Textract. The extracted text is posted in a thread under the image
  and gets indexed!
* [`SslServerTest`](src/ssl-server-test) Test a server/host for SSL/TLS on schedule and
  get notified when the overall rating is not satisfactory. [Powered by Qualys SSL Labs](https://www.ssllabs.com/).
* [`StateMachineCustomResourceProvider`](src/state-machine-cr-provider) Implement custom
  resources with AWS Step Functions state machines
* [`StaticWebsite`](src/static-website) A CloudFront static website hosted on S3 with
  HTTPS redirect, SPA redirect, HTTP security headers and backend configuration saved
  to the bucket.
* [`ToolkitCleaner`](src/toolkit-cleaner) Clean unused S3 and ECR assets from your CDK
  Toolkit.
* [`UrlShortener`](src/url-shortener) Deploy an URL shortener API

modules.name: cloudstructs
documentation:
# cloudstructs

High-level constructs for AWS CDK

## Installation

`npm install cloudstructs` or `yarn add cloudstructs`

Version >= 0.2.0 requires AWS CDK v2.

## Constructs

* [`CodeCommitMirror`](src/codecommit-mirror) Mirror a repository to AWS CodeCommit on schedule
* [`EcsServiceRoller`](src/ecs-service-roller) Roll your ECS service tasks on schedule or with
  a rule
* [`EmailReceiver`](src/email-receiver) Receive emails through SES, save them to S3
  and invoke a Lambda function
* [`MjmlTemplate`](src/mjml-template) SES email template from [MJML](https://mjml.io/)
* [`SlackApp`](src/slack-app) Deploy Slack apps from manifests
* [`SlackEvents`](src/slack-events) Send Slack events to Amazon EventBridge
* [`SlackTextract`](src/slack-textract) Extract text from images posted to Slack
  using Amazon Textract. The extracted text is posted in a thread under the image
  and gets indexed!
* [`SslServerTest`](src/ssl-server-test) Test a server/host for SSL/TLS on schedule and
  get notified when the overall rating is not satisfactory. [Powered by Qualys SSL Labs](https://www.ssllabs.com/).
* [`StateMachineCustomResourceProvider`](src/state-machine-cr-provider) Implement custom
  resources with AWS Step Functions state machines
* [`StaticWebsite`](src/static-website) A CloudFront static website hosted on S3 with
  HTTPS redirect, SPA redirect, HTTP security headers and backend configuration saved
  to the bucket.
* [`ToolkitCleaner`](src/toolkit-cleaner) Clean unused S3 and ECR assets from your CDK
  Toolkit.
* [`UrlShortener`](src/url-shortener) Deploy an URL shortener API

classes.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirror

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirror.__init__
documentation:
---
param cluster: The ECS cluster where to run the mirroring operation.
param id: '-'
param repository: The source repository.
param schedule: 'The schedule for the mirroring operation. Default: - everyday at
  midnight'
param scope: '-'
param subnet_selection: 'Where to run the mirroring Fargate tasks. Default: - public
  subnets'
---
Mirror a repository to AWS CodeCommit on schedule.

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for a CodeCommitMirror.

```
param cluster

The ECS cluster where to run the mirroring operation.

param repository

The source repository.

param schedule

The schedule for the mirroring operation. Default: - everyday at midnight

param subnet_selection

Where to run the mirroring Fargate tasks. Default: - public subnets
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorProps.cluster
documentation: The ECS cluster where to run the mirroring operation.

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorProps.repository
documentation: The source repository.

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorProps.schedule
documentation:
The schedule for the mirroring operation.

:default: - everyday at midnight

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorProps.subnet_selection
documentation:
Where to run the mirroring Fargate tasks.

:default: - public subnets

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorSourceRepository.name
documentation: The name of the repository.

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorSourceRepository.plain_text_url
documentation: The HTTPS clone URL in plain text, used for a public repository.

methods.name: cloudstructs.CodeCommitMirrorSourceRepository.secret_url
documentation:
The HTTPS clone URL if the repository is private.

The secret should contain the username and/or token.

Example:

```
`https://TOKEN@github.com/owner/name`
`https://USERNAME:TOKEN@bitbucket.org/owner/name.git`
```
A source repository for AWS CodeCommit mirroring.

methods.name: cloudstructs._CodeCommitMirrorSourceRepositoryProxy.name
documentation: The name of the repository.

methods.name: cloudstructs._CodeCommitMirrorSourceRepositoryProxy.plain_text_url
documentation: The HTTPS clone URL in plain text, used for a public repository.

methods.name: cloudstructs._CodeCommitMirrorSourceRepositoryProxy.secret_url
documentation:
The HTTPS clone URL if the repository is private.

The secret should contain the username and/or token.

Example:

```
`https://TOKEN@github.com/owner/name`
`https://USERNAME:TOKEN@bitbucket.org/owner/name.git`
```

classes.name: cloudstructs.DmarcAlignment

class_variables.name: cloudstructs.DmarcAlignment.RELAXED
documentation: Relaxed alignment mode.

class_variables.name: cloudstructs.DmarcAlignment.STRICT
documentation: Strict alignment mode.
The DMARC alignment mode.

classes.name: cloudstructs.DmarcPolicy

class_variables.name: cloudstructs.DmarcPolicy.NONE
documentation: Do not apply any special handling to messages that fail DMARC compliance.

class_variables.name: cloudstructs.DmarcPolicy.QUARANTINE
documentation:
Quarantine messages that fail DMARC compliance.

(usually by sending them to spam)

class_variables.name: cloudstructs.DmarcPolicy.REJECT
documentation:
Reject messages that fail DMARC compliance.

(usually by rejecting them outright)
The DMARC policy to apply to messages that fail DMARC compliance.

classes.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporter

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporter.__init__
documentation:
---
param additional_email_addresses: Additional email addresses to send DMARC reports
  to.
param after_rule: 'An existing rule after which the new rule will be placed in the
  rule set. Default: - The new rule is inserted at the beginning of the rule list.'
param dmarc_dkim_alignment: 'The alignment mode to use for DKIM signatures. This can
  be one of the following values: - relaxed: Use relaxed alignment mode. - strict:
  Use strict alignment mode. Default: relaxed'
param dmarc_percentage: 'The percentage of messages that should be checked for DMARC
  compliance. This is a value between 0 and 100. Default: 100'
param dmarc_policy: 'The DMARC policy to apply to messages that fail DMARC compliance.
  This can be one of the following values: - none: Do not apply any special handling
  to messages that fail DMARC compliance. - quarantine: Quarantine messages that fail
  DMARC compliance. - reject: Reject messages that fail DMARC compliance.'
param dmarc_spf_alignment: 'The alignment mode to use for SPF signatures. This can
  be one of the following values: - relaxed: Use relaxed alignment mode. - strict:
  Use strict alignment mode. Default: relaxed'
param dmarc_subdomain_policy: 'The DMARC policy to apply to messages that fail DMARC
  compliance for subdomains. This can be one of the following values: - none: Do not
  apply any special handling to messages that fail DMARC compliance. - quarantine:
  Quarantine messages that fail DMARC compliance. - reject: Reject messages that fail
  DMARC compliance. Default: inherited from dmarcPolicy'
param email_address: 'The email address to send DMARC reports to. This email address
  must be verified in SES. Default: <mailto:dmarc-reports@${hostedZone.zoneName>}'
param function: A Lambda function to invoke after the message is saved to S3. The
  Lambda function will be invoked with a SESMessage as event.
param hosted_zone: The Route 53 hosted zone to create the DMARC record in.
param id: '-'
param receipt_rule_set: The SES receipt rule set where a receipt rule will be added.
param scope: '-'
---
Creates a DMARC record in Route 53 and invokes a Lambda function to process incoming reports.

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for a DmarcReporter.

```
param dmarc_policy

The DMARC policy to apply to messages that fail DMARC compliance. This can be one of the following values: - none: Do not apply any special handling to messages that fail DMARC compliance. - quarantine: Quarantine messages that fail DMARC compliance. - reject: Reject messages that fail DMARC compliance.

param function

A Lambda function to invoke after the message is saved to S3. The Lambda function will be invoked with a SESMessage as event.

param hosted_zone

The Route 53 hosted zone to create the DMARC record in.

param receipt_rule_set

The SES receipt rule set where a receipt rule will be added.

param additional_email_addresses

Additional email addresses to send DMARC reports to.

param after_rule

An existing rule after which the new rule will be placed in the rule set. Default: - The new rule is inserted at the beginning of the rule list.

param dmarc_dkim_alignment

The alignment mode to use for DKIM signatures. This can be one of the following values: - relaxed: Use relaxed alignment mode. - strict: Use strict alignment mode. Default: relaxed

param dmarc_percentage

The percentage of messages that should be checked for DMARC compliance. This is a value between 0 and 100. Default: 100

param dmarc_spf_alignment

The alignment mode to use for SPF signatures. This can be one of the following values: - relaxed: Use relaxed alignment mode. - strict: Use strict alignment mode. Default: relaxed

param dmarc_subdomain_policy

The DMARC policy to apply to messages that fail DMARC compliance for subdomains. This can be one of the following values: - none: Do not apply any special handling to messages that fail DMARC compliance. - quarantine: Quarantine messages that fail DMARC compliance. - reject: Reject messages that fail DMARC compliance. Default: inherited from dmarcPolicy

param email_address

The email address to send DMARC reports to. This email address must be verified in SES. Default: dmarc-reports@${hostedZone.zoneName}
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.dmarc_policy
documentation:
The DMARC policy to apply to messages that fail DMARC compliance.

This can be one of the following values:

- none: Do not apply any special handling to messages that fail DMARC compliance.
- quarantine: Quarantine messages that fail DMARC compliance.
- reject: Reject messages that fail DMARC compliance.

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.function
documentation:
A Lambda function to invoke after the message is saved to S3.

The Lambda
function will be invoked with a SESMessage as event.

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.hosted_zone
documentation: The Route 53 hosted zone to create the DMARC record in.

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.receipt_rule_set
documentation: The SES receipt rule set where a receipt rule will be added.

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.additional_email_addresses
documentation: Additional email addresses to send DMARC reports to.

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.after_rule
documentation:
An existing rule after which the new rule will be placed in the rule set.

:default: - The new rule is inserted at the beginning of the rule list.

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.dmarc_dkim_alignment
documentation:
The alignment mode to use for DKIM signatures.

This can be one of the following values:

- relaxed: Use relaxed alignment mode.
- strict: Use strict alignment mode.

:default: relaxed

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.dmarc_percentage
documentation:
The percentage of messages that should be checked for DMARC compliance.

This is a value between 0 and 100.

:default: 100

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.dmarc_spf_alignment
documentation:
The alignment mode to use for SPF signatures.

This can be one of the following values:

- relaxed: Use relaxed alignment mode.
- strict: Use strict alignment mode.

:default: relaxed

methods.name: cloudstructs.DmarcReporterProps.dmarc_subdomain_policy
documentation:
The DMARC policy to apply to messages that fail DMARC compliance for subdomains.

This can be one of the following values:

- none: Do not apply any special handling to messages that fail DMARC compliance.
- quarantine: Quarantine messages that fail DMARC compliance.
- reject: Reject messages that fail DMARC compliance.

:default: inherited from dmarcPolicy

param id: '-'

param service: The ECS service for which tasks should be rolled.
param trigger: 'The rule or schedule that should trigger a roll. Default: - roll everyday
  at midnight'
---
Roll your ECS service tasks on schedule or with a rule.

```

The ECS service for which tasks should be rolled.

param trigger

The rule or schedule that should trigger a roll. Default: - roll everyday at midnight
```

documentation: The ECS cluster where the services run.

methods.name: cloudstructs.EcsServiceRollerProps.service

methods.name: cloudstructs.EcsServiceRollerProps.trigger

classes.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiver

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiver.__init__
documentation:
---
param after_rule: 'An existing rule after which the new rule will be placed in the
  rule set. Default: - The new rule is inserted at the beginning of the rule list.'
param enabled: 'Whether the receiver is active. Default: true'
param function: A Lambda function to invoke after the message is saved to S3. The
  Lambda function will be invoked with a SESMessage as event.
param id: '-'
param receipt_rule_set: The SES receipt rule set where a receipt rule will be added.
param recipients: The recipients for which emails should be received.
param scope: '-'
param source_whitelist: 'A regular expression to whitelist source email addresses.
  Default: - no whitelisting of source email addresses'
---
Receive emails through SES, save them to S3 and invokes a Lambda function.

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiverProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for an EmailReceiver.

```
param function

A Lambda function to invoke after the message is saved to S3. The Lambda function will be invoked with a SESMessage as event.

param receipt_rule_set

The SES receipt rule set where a receipt rule will be added.

param recipients

The recipients for which emails should be received.

param after_rule

An existing rule after which the new rule will be placed in the rule set. Default: - The new rule is inserted at the beginning of the rule list.

param enabled

Whether the receiver is active. Default: true

param source_whitelist

A regular expression to whitelist source email addresses. Default: - no whitelisting of source email addresses
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiverProps.function
documentation:
A Lambda function to invoke after the message is saved to S3.

The Lambda
function will be invoked with a SESMessage as event.

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiverProps.receipt_rule_set
documentation: The SES receipt rule set where a receipt rule will be added.

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiverProps.recipients
documentation: The recipients for which emails should be received.

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiverProps.after_rule
documentation:
An existing rule after which the new rule will be placed in the rule set.

:default: - The new rule is inserted at the beginning of the rule list.

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiverProps.enabled
documentation:
Whether the receiver is active.

:default: true

methods.name: cloudstructs.EmailReceiverProps.source_whitelist
documentation:
A regular expression to whitelist source email addresses.

:default: - no whitelisting of source email addresses

classes.name: cloudstructs.MjmlTemplate

methods.name: cloudstructs.MjmlTemplate.__init__
documentation:
---
param id: '-'
param mjml: The MJML for the email.
param scope: '-'

documentation: A dynamic reference to the client secret of the app.

methods.name: cloudstructs.SlackApp.credentials
documentation:
An AWS Secrets Manager secret containing the credentials of the application.

Example:

```
{
  "appId": "...",
  "clientId": "...",
  "clientSecret": "...",
  "verificationToken": "...",
  "signingSecret": "..."
}
```

classes.name: cloudstructs.SlackAppManifest

methods.name: cloudstructs.SlackAppManifest.__init__
documentation:
---
param allowed_ip_address_ranges: An array of IP addresses that conform to the Allowed
  IP Ranges feature.
param app_home: App Home configuration.
param background_color: 'A hex color value that specifies the background color used
  on hovercards that display information about your app. Can be 3-digit (#000) or
  6-digit (#000000) hex values with or without #'
param bot_user: Bot user configuration.
param description: 'A short description of the app for display to users. Maximum length
  is 140 characters. Default: - no short description'
param event_subscriptions: Events API configuration for the app.
param interactivity: Interactivity configuration for the app.
param long_description: A longer version of the description of the app. Maximum length
  is 4000 characters.
param major_version: 'The major version of the manifest schema to target. Default:
  - do not target a specific major version'
param minor_version: 'The minor version of the manifest schema to target. Default:
  - do not target a specific minor version'
param name: The name of the app. Maximum length is 35 characters.
param oauth_config: OAuth configuration for the app.
param org_deploy: 'Whether org-wide deploy is enabled. Default: false'
param shortcuts: Shortcuts configuration. A maximum of 5 shortcuts can be included.
param slash_commands: Slash commands configuration. A maximum of 5 slash commands
  can be included.
param socket_mode: 'Whether Socket Mode is enabled. Default: false'
param unfurl_domains: Valid unfurl domains to register. A maximum of 5 unfurl domains
  can be included.
param workflow_steps: Workflow steps. A maximum of 10 workflow steps can be included.
---

methods.name: cloudstructs.SlackAppManifest.render
documentation:
---
param construct: '-'
---

A Slack app manifest.

:see: https://api.slack.com/reference/manifests

Creates a Slack app manifest from a file containg a JSON app manifest.

param file

methods.name: cloudstructs.SlackAppManifestDefinition.from_manifest
documentation:
Creates a Slack app manifest by specifying properties.

```
param name

The name of the app. Maximum length is 35 characters.

param allowed_ip_address_ranges

An array of IP addresses that conform to the Allowed IP Ranges feature.

param app_home

App Home configuration.

param background_color

A hex color value that specifies the background color used on hovercards that display information about your app. Can be 3-digit (#000) or 6-digit (#000000) hex values with or without #

param bot_user

Bot user configuration.

param description

A short description of the app for display to users. Maximum length is 140 characters. Default: - no short description

param event_subscriptions

Events API configuration for the app.

param interactivity

Interactivity configuration for the app.

param long_description

A longer version of the description of the app. Maximum length is 4000 characters.

param major_version

The major version of the manifest schema to target. Default: - do not target a specific major version

param minor_version

The minor version of the manifest schema to target. Default: - do not target a specific minor version

param oauth_config

OAuth configuration for the app.

param org_deploy

Whether org-wide deploy is enabled. Default: false

param shortcuts

Shortcuts configuration. A maximum of 5 shortcuts can be included.

param slash_commands

Slash commands configuration. A maximum of 5 slash commands can be included.

param socket_mode

Whether Socket Mode is enabled. Default: false

param unfurl_domains

Valid unfurl domains to register. A maximum of 5 unfurl domains can be included.

param workflow_steps

Workflow steps. A maximum of 10 workflow steps can be included.
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.SlackAppManifestProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for a Slack app manifest.

```
param name

The name of the app. Maximum length is 35 characters.

param allowed_ip_address_ranges

An array of IP addresses that conform to the Allowed IP Ranges feature.

param app_home

App Home configuration.

param background_color

A hex color value that specifies the background color used on hovercards that display information about your app. Can be 3-digit (#000) or 6-digit (#000000) hex values with or without #

param bot_user

Bot user configuration.

param description

A short description of the app for display to users. Maximum length is 140 characters. Default: - no short description

param event_subscriptions

Events API configuration for the app.

param interactivity

Interactivity configuration for the app.

param long_description

A longer version of the description of the app. Maximum length is 4000 characters.

param major_version

The major version of the manifest schema to target. Default: - do not target a specific major version

param minor_version

The minor version of the manifest schema to target. Default: - do not target a specific minor version

param oauth_config

OAuth configuration for the app.

param org_deploy

Whether org-wide deploy is enabled. Default: false

param shortcuts

Shortcuts configuration. A maximum of 5 shortcuts can be included.

param slash_commands

Slash commands configuration. A maximum of 5 slash commands can be included.

param socket_mode

Whether Socket Mode is enabled. Default: false

param unfurl_domains

Valid unfurl domains to register. A maximum of 5 unfurl domains can be included.

param workflow_steps

Workflow steps. A maximum of 10 workflow steps can be included.

see

https://api.slack.com/reference/manifests
```

:default: false

---
param alarm_topic: 'The topic to which the results must be sent when the grade is
  below the minimum grade. Default: - a new topic is created'
param host: The hostname to test.
param id: '-'
param minimum_grade: 'Minimum grade for the test. The grade is calculated using the
  worst grade of all endpoints. Used to send the results to an alarm SNS topic. Default:
  SslServerTestGrade.A_PLUS'
param schedule: 'The schedule for the test. Default: - every day'
param scope: '-'
---

Minimum grade for the test. The grade is calculated using the worst grade of all endpoints. Used to send the results to an alarm SNS topic. Default: SslServerTestGrade.A_PLUS

classes.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsite

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsite.__init__
documentation:
---
param backend_configuration: A backend configuration that will be saved as `config.json`
  in the S3 bucket of the static website. The frontend can query this config by doing
  `fetch('/config.json')`.
param cache_policy: 'Cache policy for the default behavior. Default: CachePolicy.CACHING_OPTIMIZED'
param domain_name: The domain name for this static website.
param edge_lambdas: 'The <mailto:Lambda@Edge> functions to invoke before serving the
  contents. Default: - an origin request function that redirects all requests for
  a path to /index.html'
param hosted_zone: The hosted zone where records should be added.
param id: '-'
param redirects: 'A list of domain names that should redirect to `domainName`. Default:
  - the domain name of the hosted zone'
param response_headers_policy: 'Response headers policy for the default behavior.
  Default: - a new policy is created with best practice security headers'
param scope: '-'
---

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsite.default_security_headers_behavior
documentation: Best practice security headers used as default.

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsite.bucket
documentation: The S3 bucket of this static website.

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsite.distribution
documentation: The CloudFront distribution of this static website.
A CloudFront static website hosted on S3.

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for a StaticWebsite.

```
param domain_name

The domain name for this static website.

param hosted_zone

The hosted zone where records should be added.

param backend_configuration

A backend configuration that will be saved as config.json in the S3 bucket of the static website. The frontend can query this config by doing fetch('/config.json').

param cache_policy

Cache policy for the default behavior. Default: CachePolicy.CACHING_OPTIMIZED

param edge_lambdas

The Lambda@Edge functions to invoke before serving the contents. Default: - an origin request function that redirects all requests for a path to /index.html

param redirects

A list of domain names that should redirect to domainName. Default: - the domain name of the hosted zone

param response_headers_policy

Response headers policy for the default behavior. Default: - a new policy is created with best practice security headers
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.domain_name
documentation:
The domain name for this static website.

Example:

```
www.my-static-website.com
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.hosted_zone
documentation: The hosted zone where records should be added.

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.backend_configuration
documentation:
A backend configuration that will be saved as `config.json` in the S3 bucket of the static website.

The frontend can query this config by doing `fetch('/config.json')`.

Example:

```
{ userPoolId: '1234', apiEndoint: 'https://www.my-api.com/api' }
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.cache_policy
documentation:
Cache policy for the default behavior.

:default: CachePolicy.CACHING_OPTIMIZED

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.edge_lambdas
documentation:
The Lambda@Edge functions to invoke before serving the contents.

:default: - an origin request function that redirects all requests for a path to /index.html

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.redirects
documentation:
A list of domain names that should redirect to `domainName`.

```
default

the domain name of the hosted zone
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.StaticWebsiteProps.response_headers_policy
documentation:
Response headers policy for the default behavior.

:default: - a new policy is created with best practice security headers

classes.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleaner

methods.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleaner.__init__
documentation:
---
param clean_assets_timeout: 'The timeout for the Lambda functions that clean assets.
  Default: Duration.minutes(5)'
param dry_run: Only output number of assets and total size that would be deleted but
  without actually deleting assets.
param id: '-'
param retain_assets_newer_than: 'Retain unused assets that were created recently.
  Default: - all unused assets are removed'
param schedule: 'The schedule for the cleaner. Default: - every day'
param schedule_enabled: 'Whether to clean on schedule. If you''d like to run the cleanup
  manually via the console, set to `false`. Default: true'
param scope: '-'
---
Clean unused S3 and ECR assets from your CDK Toolkit.

methods.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleanerProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for a ToolkitCleaner.

```
param clean_assets_timeout

The timeout for the Lambda functions that clean assets. Default: Duration.minutes(5)

param dry_run

Only output number of assets and total size that would be deleted but without actually deleting assets.

param retain_assets_newer_than

Retain unused assets that were created recently. Default: - all unused assets are removed

param schedule

The schedule for the cleaner. Default: - every day

param schedule_enabled

Whether to clean on schedule. If you'd like to run the cleanup manually via the console, set to false. Default: true
```

methods.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleanerProps.clean_assets_timeout
documentation:
The timeout for the Lambda functions that clean assets.

:default: Duration.minutes(5)

methods.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleanerProps.dry_run
documentation: Only output number of assets and total size that would be deleted but without actually deleting assets.

methods.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleanerProps.retain_assets_newer_than
documentation:
Retain unused assets that were created recently.

:default: - all unused assets are removed

methods.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleanerProps.schedule
documentation:
The schedule for the cleaner.

:default: - every day

methods.name: cloudstructs.ToolkitCleanerProps.schedule_enabled
documentation:
Whether to clean on schedule.

If you'd like to run the cleanup manually
via the console, set to `false`.

```
default

true
```

classes.name: cloudstructs.UrlShortener

methods.name: cloudstructs.UrlShortener.__init__
documentation:
---
param api_gateway_authorizer: 'Authorizer for API gateway. Default: - do not use an
  authorizer for the API'
param api_gateway_endpoint: 'An interface VPC endpoint for API gateway. Specifying
  this property will make the API private. Default: - API is public'
param bucket_name: 'A name for the bucket saving the redirects. Default: - derived
  from short link domain name'
param cors_allow_origins: 'Allowed origins for CORS. Default: - CORS is not enabled'
param expiration: 'Expiration for short urls. Default: cdk.Duration.days(365)'
param hosted_zone: The hosted zone for the short URLs domain.
param iam_authorization: 'Whether to use IAM authorization. Default: - do not use
  IAM authorization'
param id: '-'
param record_name: 'The record name to use in the hosted zone. Default: - zone root'
param scope: '-'
---

methods.name: cloudstructs.UrlShortener.grant_invoke
documentation:
Grant access to invoke the URL shortener if protected by IAM authorization.

```
param grantee

```

methods.name: cloudstructs.UrlShortener.api
documentation: The underlying API Gateway REST API.

methods.name: cloudstructs.UrlShortener.api_endpoint
documentation: The endpoint of the URL shortener API.
URL shortener.

methods.name: cloudstructs.UrlShortenerProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for a UrlShortener.

```
param hosted_zone

The hosted zone for the short URLs domain.

param api_gateway_authorizer

Authorizer for API gateway. Default: - do not use an authorizer for the API

param api_gateway_endpoint

An interface VPC endpoint for API gateway. Specifying this property will make the API private. Default: - API is public

param bucket_name

A name for the bucket saving the redirects. Default: - derived from short link domain name

param cors_allow_origins

Allowed origins for CORS. Default: - CORS is not enabled

param expiration

Expiration for short urls. Default: cdk.Duration.days(365)

param iam_authorization

Whether to use IAM authorization. Default: - do not use IAM authorization

param record_name

The record name to use in the hosted zone. Default: - zone root
```

Authorizer for API gateway.

:default: - do not use an authorizer for the API

:default: - CORS is not enabled
